titleStmt.title: SII 17.446: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 446. (A.R. No. 416 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date viz. Saturday, Aviṭṭam, Prathamai (in line 4) can only occur in the month Māgha. These details of date will correspond to 1208 A.D. January 19 Saturday, f.d.t. ·20: f.d.n. ·11.

This records the gift of 1500 kāśu left in the hands of the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple by Iḷaiyāḻvāṉ Tiruviḍaimaruduḍaiyāṉ, a member of the body called Vīraśōḻa Aṇukkar, for a perpetual lamp to be burnt with one uḻakku of ghee by the measure karuṇākaraṉ-nāḻi, to the deity Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-Uḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭi
yaṉ muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Uṭaiyaār tiruma
ṟaikkāṭuṭaiyaārkku Ivvūr kāṇi Uṭaiya viracoḻa Aṇukkaril Iḷaiyāḻvān tiruviṭai marutuṭai
yān canikkiḻamai peṟṟa Aviṭṭamum pratipatam Aṉṟu vaitta tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟu Ikko
yil muppatuvaṭṭattu kāṇiuṭaiya civappirāmaṇar kaikkoṇṭa kācu Āyirattaiñūṟum kai
kkoṇṭu karunākaṟan nāḻiyāl Uḻakkuney yaṭṭi cantirātittavarai tirunontāviḷakku
Erikkak kaṭavomānom muppatuvaṭṭattu kāṇiuṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom panmāke śurarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.446 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
